focus_tree = {
	id = submod_test_tree
	country = {
		factor = 0
		modifier = {
			add = 10
			tag = SOV
		}
	}

	focus = {
		id = submod_focus_one
		icon = GFX_focus_generic_industry
		cost = 10
		x = 0
		y = 0
		completion_reward = {
			add_political_power = 100
		}
	}

	focus = {
		id = submod_focus_two
		icon = GFX_focus_generic_army
		cost = 10
		x = 2
		y = 0
		prerequisite = { focus = submod_focus_one }
		completion_reward = {
			add_political_power = 50
			add_stability = 0.05
		}
	}
}
